## Checklist

- [ ] `stylua .` run (formatting clean)
- [ ] `nvim -l tests/run.lua` passes
- [ ] If colors changed: before/after screenshot attached
- [ ] If a foreground color was added/changed: it's covered in `tests/run.lua`
- [ ] Checked both dark and light variants (if applicable)
